article_meta.title: SCOTUS Pro-Life Center Takes Its Fight Against Democrat Lawfare To The Supreme Court By: Shawn Fleetwood November 21, 20

reasoning: Classification direction is correct (Right) with appropriate high confidence given strong partisan headline and one-sided framing. However, multiple attribution-rule violations occur: the model cites quoted source language as key indicators (e.g., Huber and ADF counsel quotes) and even misattributes a quoted phrase as the author's voice. Evidence quality suffers despite a correct rating.

custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Multiple key indicators quote sources rather than author prose (Huber, ADF counsel) and one includes quoted text; reasoning also leans on sourced quotes, violating attribution rules.
